Internationalization support, functions, macros, MO file handling, system calls, and license terms.


## Files
- **[i18n.c](i18n.c.md)**: Internationalization support for Pebble firmware, including string translation and language resource management.
- **[i18n.h](i18n.h.md)**: Internationalization functions and macros for string translation and management.
- **[LICENSE](LICENSE.md)**: License terms and conditions for redistribution and use of the Citrus Project software.
- **[mo.h](mo.h.md)**: Defines structures and constants for handling the MO file format used in internationalization.
- **[syscalls.c](syscalls.c.md)**: Defines system calls for internationalization functions, including locale retrieval and string handling.
